title: Medieval Tournament Announcement
text:
## Medieval Tournament Announcement

Hear ye, citizens of {place}! The {adjective} tournament begins this {day of week}.

Knights will {verb}, bards will sing of {plural noun}, and {person} will judge the {color} banner contest.

First prize is {number} gold {noun} and a ceremonial {object}.

Competitors must wear a {clothing item}, feed their {animal}, and avoid {verb ending in -ing} near the royal {food} table.

Any {job} caught cheating will be publicly {emotion} beside the {color} {vehicle}.
